Precondition: box_1 is accessible and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact (left & right).

Precondition: box_1 is grasped and the table area right of box_2 is available for placement.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table right of box_2.

Precondition: box_2 is accessible and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact (left & right).
